en.title: Can a Fan Cut Your Summer AC Bill? Five Models by CFM, dB, and Daily kWh
en.description: Five electric fans for hot bedrooms and WFH rooms — airflow CFM, sleep noise in dB, wattage vs window AC, and scenario picks for summer heat waves.

ko.title: 폭염·방학철 작은 방, 선풍기는 풍량·소음·전기료로 고른다
